title: Argentinian Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish featuring tender beef and rich argentinian inspiration.

ingredients.name: Rich Argentinian chimichurri sauce (1 cup)
ingredients.notes: see notes for homemade chimichurri recipe

ingredients.name: stir-fry oil (1/4 cup)
ingredients.notes: grapeseed or peanut oil work well

instructions: Heat stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
Add onion, bell pepper, and garlic to skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add tomato and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Return beef to skillet and stir in chimichurri sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until beef is coated in sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
